title: AgriChain
taglinePro: Enterprise agri intelligence with live market strategy
enterCropLocationHint: Run analysis from the left panel to populate this dashboard.
aiInsightDefault: AI Insight: Run analysis to generate a personalized recommendation.
modelBlendNote: Price (50%), spoilage (30%), and harvest readiness (20%) are blended for this recommendation.
launchSubtitle: Start from India-level visibility, then dive into Maharashtra to run production-grade mandi intelligence workflows.
launchOverviewDesc: Predict prices, evaluate spoilage logistics, and identify the highest-value mandi before dispatch.
launchMaharashtraOnly: Current production services are available for Maharashtra only.
clickToEnter: Click below to enter Maharashtra dashboard experience.
launchFeature1: AI-driven market timing and revenue optimization
launchFeature3: Interactive mandi map and comparative analytics
feature1Desc: Get real-time price predictions and market insights powered by machine learning
feature2Desc: Minimize losses with intelligent spoilage risk assessment and logistics planning
feature3Desc: Visualize price trends across multiple mandis and make data-driven decisions
